meaning: n.半年刊adj.半年一次的,每年两次的adv.每年两次地
examples: Under normal working condition, this equipment is generally maintained semiyearly after the installation and debugging.
We suggest you replace the anti-wear hydraulic oil in the pump semiyearly, so increase of service life of the electric pump.
Low maintenance cost. Under normal working condition, this equipment is generally maintained semiyearly after the installation and debugging.
